source.description: A corrected six-panel pencil process contact sheet reviewed for suspension geometry.
source.notes: One consistent near-front porch swing on warm drawing paper. Both armrests and their eye bolts are established before two vertical chains are added directly above them.

process_strategy: The contact sheet builds one near-front hanging bench from a light seat box and back guide. The complete seat frame, armrests, supports, and two eye bolts appear before the chains. The next panel adds one vertical chain directly above each established eye bolt, with both chains staying outside the bench and stopping at the mounts. Later panels add the cushion, slats, restrained color, and final graphite cleanup without rerouting either chain.

final_elements.name: seat box and back guides
final_elements.description: A light near-front seat box and tall back guide with no chains yet.

final_elements.name: wooden seat frame, armrests, supports, and eye bolts
final_elements.description: A settled wooden seat frame, two armrests with front supports, and one small eye bolt on the top outer end of each armrest.

final_elements.name: two chains outside the woodwork
final_elements.description: Two linked chains descend through blank space outside the bench and end cleanly at the established armrest eye bolts without continuing below or passing through wood.

final_elements.name: seat cushion and slatted back frame
final_elements.description: A soft rectangular cushion plus the tall back frame and its evenly spaced wooden slats.

final_elements.name: pale teal cushion tint, wood tone, and floor shadow
final_elements.description: Restrained color on established forms with a soft shadow below.

frames.visible_job: Places the seat box and tall back guide in a balanced near-front view without introducing chains.
Builds the wooden seat frame, both armrests and supports, and one visible eye bolt on the top outer end of each armrest.
introduces: wooden seat frame, armrests, supports, and eye bolts

frames.visible_job: Adds two linked chains through blank space outside the bench, each ending at an established armrest eye bolt with no chain below the mount.
requires_prior_elements: wooden seat frame, armrests, supports, and eye bolts

frames.visible_job: Adds the tall back frame, separated slats, and cushion while preserving the outside chain paths.
introduces: seat cushion and slatted back frame
requires_prior_elements: wooden seat frame, armrests, supports, and eye bolts

frames.visible_job: Adds pale color and a soft floor shadow to established shapes without moving either chain or eye bolt.
introduces: pale teal cushion tint, wood tone, and floor shadow
requires_prior_elements: wooden seat frame, armrests, supports, and eye bolts
seat cushion and slatted back frame

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established contours, outside chain paths, eye-bolt connections, slats, cushion color, wood tone, and shadow.

rejection_checks: No chain, eye bolt, armrest, support, slat, cushion, tint, or shadow may first appear in the final image.
The swing must retain one near-front angle, scale, and chain placement across all frames.
Panel 2 must contain both armrests and both eye bolts but no chains; panel 3 must add exactly two chains to those established eye bolts.
Both chains must stay outside the armrests and bench silhouette, end at the visible armrest eye bolts, and never continue below or pass through a wooden part.
No late panel may add porch architecture, plants, pillows, or decorative carving.
